openIssues.title: ready issue after closed PR recreate path
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 closed PR 历史不会继续阻塞 fresh PR recreate path。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/pr-reporter.ts

### MustPreserve
- replay remains local and deterministic

### OutOfScope
- touching live GitHub PR state

### RequiredSemantics
- issue is still claimable when no open linked PR remains

### ReviewHints
- verify the case stays green without network access

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap closed pr recreate fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture

## 验收
- [ ] ready issue remains claimable

issueComments.body: Historical note: a previous linked PR was closed and should not appear in the open PR replay state.
